untranslatable_reason: This signal describes a market manipulation/layering strategy that requires order book microstructure data (bid/ask sizes, order placement, cancellation timing, and panicked seller detection). The ALLOWED_INDICATORS set contains only OHLCV and derived technical indicators—it lacks access to: (1) real-time order book depth, (2) order placement/cancellation events, (3) trader psychology/panic detection, and (4) latency-sensitive execution sequencing. A backtest engine using only OHLCV candle data cannot simulate the false liquidity creation, order cancellation mechanics, or panic-driven fill timing that are central to this strategy.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation: Entry condition uses vol_ratio_20 near 1.0 (similar bid/ask sizes proxy), exit uses price above SMA_5 (crude proxy for panic exit). However, this approximation loses 95%+ of the signal's logic and would not produce meaningful backtest results. Recommend: (1) use a microstructure-aware backtest engine with order book replay, or (2) redesign signal using only standard technical indicators.
